purpose: Record human truth (gold) and machine truth (GPT-4o judge label) per case for the calibration baseline.
source_pool: Sara ∩ Jose unanimous human-agreement subset, N=112 (build_gold_112.py)
full_112_baseline: 102/112 = 91.1% (this 100-subsample is the upper tail; full pool is the unbiased baseline)
raw_human_export: NOT included by design; only the resolved human gold + GPT label are kept.
